label: DMSP-OLS, NPP VIIRS annual mix
case: Retrieve DMSP–OLS annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2005 to 2011 and NPP VIIRS annual NTL data for Shanghai from 2012 to 2015.

label: Annual,monthly,daily mix
case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS annual NTL data for Shanghai in 2020, NPP VIIRS monthly NTL data for January 2020, and NPP VIIRS daily NTL data in January 1 2020.

label: Weekends composite
case: Composite VNP46A2 NTL data for Shanghai on all weekends of Jan 2020 into a single image.

label: Landscan
case: Retrieve LandScan population imagery for Shanghai in 2020.

label: NDVI
case: Retrieve MODIS MOD13Q1 NDVI data for Shanghai in 2020.

label: GDELT Event
case: Retrieve event records related to the 2023 Turkey earthquake from the GDELT Event Database.

label: VNP46A2 angular effect correction
case: Perform angle effect correction on daily VNP46A2 NTL data for Shanghai from Jan 1 to Dec 31, 2024.

label: VNP46A2 seasonal adjustment
case: Perform seasonal adjustment on daily VNP46A2 NTL data for Shanghai from Jan 1 to Dec 31, 2024.

label: DMSP-OLS preprocess
case: Preprocess the 2010 DMSP NTL data for Shanghai using EVI imagery

label: VNCI
case: Calculate VNCI using the NPP-VIIRS-like NTL and NDVI images for Shanghai in 2020.

label: SDGSAT-1 NDIBG
case: Calculate NDIBG using the SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

label: SDGSAT-1 RBLI
case: Calculate RBLI using the SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

label: Minimum NTL intensity [MinNTL]
case: Calculate minimum NTL intensity of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Standard deviation of NTL [SDNTL]
case: Calculate standard deviation of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Pixel value distribution [HistNTL]
case: Calculate pixel value distribution of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Total lit area [LArea]
case: Calculate total lit area of NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: 3D percentage of landscape area [3DPL]
case: Calculate 3D percentage of  landscape area of NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: 3D edge density [3DED]
case: Calculate 3D edge density of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: 3D largest patch index [3DLPI]
case: Calculate 3D largest patch index of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Deviation of NTL intensity [DNTL]
case: Calculate deviation of NTL intensity of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Digital economy index [DEI]
case: Estimate digital economy index of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each city in Jiangsu province, 2020.

label: Threshold processing
case: Within Shanghai’s 2020 administrative boundary, calculate the proportion of NPP-VIIRS NTL pixels with values lower than 3.

label: Digital economy index [DEI]
case: Please read the 2022 DEI data for the top 20 Chinese cities from inputs\DEI_1_20.xlsx, retrieve the corresponding 2022 ANTL values by matching city names, analyze the relationship between ANTL and DEI, and fit a regression model for analysis.

label: Population
case: Please retrieve the NPP VIIRS NTL imagery and LandScan imagery from 2013 to 2023, compute the annual ANTL and total population for each year, analyze the relationship between ANTL and total population.

label: SDG 7.1.1
case: Please use the 2020 NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery and LandScan population data to measure the population with access to electricity.

label: Urban Center Detection
case: Autonomously implement the localized contour tree method from Chen et al. (2017) by writing a complete, executable script that identifies all elementary urban centers in Shanghai from annual NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery (2020).
